title: Codex plugin install docs added
summary: linux-admin now documents how to use or install the skill pack with Codex through AGENTS.md, the Codex app/CLI plugin directory when published/shared, or vendoring into another repository.
highlights: README now has an explicit Install/use linux-admin with Codex section.
Codex CLI /plugins and Codex app Add to Codex workflows are documented.
docs/CODEX_USAGE.md now includes project-pack, plugin-directory, and submodule/vendor installation paths.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.56 with 114 expert skills.
